channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Planks of wood dumped on road, 18th March
item.description:
Planks of wood have been dumped on The Road at the rear of the magistrates court. They have been there for some time , the road often has rubbish dumped there . Not sure if it’s a private road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blyth Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Opp. Of tortilla, 18th March
item.description:
A bunch of black bin bags

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, The Cut, Southwark, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A massive probably human pop, 18th March
item.description:
On the corner of Waylett place and Norwood Road there is an absolutely massive pile of poo. Looks to big for a dog.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Waylett Place, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No tex, 18th March
item.description:

item.title: Abandoned vehicle, 18th March
item.description:
The vehicle has been parked on the corner of Sudbury Crescent and Brook Lane for past two weeks in a dangerous position

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sudbury Crescent, Plaistow, Greater London

item.title: 4 different pot holes on entrance to Elmhurst Road, 18th March
item.description:
Potholes have grown over time making it difficult to drive into Elmhurst Road without hitting one of them.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmhurst Road, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish in the green areas and bushes, 18th March
item.description:
Because of the foxes and the wind, there is rubbish scattered along the pavement, grass, and bushes throughout Tarragon Grove. It has been like this for weeks and keeps getting worse. Please send someone to clean it up.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tarragon Grove, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: In a front of 236 Amherst Drive, 18th March
item.description:
Barriers left by council team after some works, in a front of 236 Amherst Drive, obstructing parking area and pavement. Falling onto street during windy days, dangerous for traffic and pedestrians.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 230, Amherst Drive, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
